};
const MDXLayout = "wrapper"
function MDXContent({
  components,
  ...props
}) {
  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">

    <Meta title="Best practices" mdxType="Meta" />
    <h6 {...{
      "id": "updated-in-15-jun-2022"
    }}>{`Updated in 15 Jun 2022`}</h6>
    <h1 {...{
      "id": "best-practices"
    }}>{`Best practices`}</h1>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "use-native-submit-action-instead-of-applicationsubmit-event"
    }}>{`Use native submit action instead of `}<inlineCode parentName="h2">{`applicationSubmit`}</inlineCode>{` event`}</h2>
    <p>{`With the old Squiz Matrix formio template, `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`applicationSubmit`}</inlineCode>{` event is used extensively to replace the out of the box submit action in submit button.`}</p>
    <p>{`This is `}<strong parentName="p">{`NOT`}</strong>{` recommended anymore with the use of FormioLoader in the Squiz Matrix formio template V2 as the old approach has taken away multiple features from the native submit button,
such as auto scrolling to error message, loading/disabled states of the submit button, multiple clicks prevention on the button, etc.`}</p>
    <p>{`Custom submit action should be defined in the form controller hook with the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`submitDone`}</inlineCode>{` event\`, ie.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-jsx"
      }}>{`({ form }) => {
form.on("submitDone", (e) => {
  // you can see the event object in the browser's inspector.
  console.info("submitDone", e);
  // you can define custom action here after form submission
});
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Please refer to `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "?path=/docs/helpers-formioloader--page"
      }}>{`here`}</a>{` for how to use the hook with FormioLoader
and `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://www.qld.gov.au/_resources/matrix-documentation/components/form.io-guides/form.io-forms-v2",
        "target": "_blank",
        "rel": "nofollow noopener noreferrer"
      }}>{`here`}</a>{` for how to use the hook in Squiz Matrix formio template.`}</p>
    <p>{`You could also modify `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`/src/config/createForm.controller.js`}</inlineCode>{` and create PR to add a default custom submit action which will be available globally.`}</p>
    </MDXLayout>;
}
