
import React from 'react'
import { mdx } from '@mdx-js/react'

/* @jsxRuntime classic */
/* @jsx mdx */
import { assertIsFn, AddContext } from "@storybook/addon-docs";

import { Canvas, Meta, Story } from "@storybook/addon-docs";
import { DownloadPdf } from "./DownloadPdf";
import { downloadPdfCode } from "./DownloadPdf.code";
import { DownloadPdfWizard } from "./DownloadPdfWizard";
import { downloadPdfWizardCode } from "./DownloadPdfWizard.code";


const layoutProps = {
  
};
const MDXLayout = "wrapper"
function MDXContent({
  components,
  ...props
}) {
  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">

    <Meta title="Examples/DownloadPdf" mdxType="Meta" />
    <h1 {...{
      "id": "download-pdf-example"
    }}>{`Download PDF example`}</h1>
    <p>{`This example is still in BETA.`}</p>
    <p>{`This example using the form.io form action and PdfSubmitButton component to enable PDF generation for the submission.`}</p>
    <p>{`TODO - document the process of setup the form action in form.io, with the action title needed to be `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`pdfUrl`}</inlineCode></p>
    <Canvas withSource="open" mdxType="Canvas">
  <Story name="downloadPdf" parameters={{
        docs: {
          source: {
            code: downloadPdfCode
          }
        }
      }} mdxType="Story">
    {() => DownloadPdf()}
  </Story>
    </Canvas>
    <p>{`Example below shows using the PdfSubmitButton in a wizard form, just drag and drop the component to the last wizard page.`}</p>
    <Canvas withSource="open" mdxType="Canvas">
  <Story name="downloadPdfWizard" parameters={{
        docs: {
          source: {
            code: downloadPdfWizardCode
          }
        }
      }} mdxType="Story">
    {() => DownloadPdfWizard()}
  </Story>
    </Canvas>
    </MDXLayout>;
}

;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;

export const downloadPdf = (() => DownloadPdf());
downloadPdf.storyName = 'downloadPdf';
downloadPdf.parameters = { storySource: { source: '() => DownloadPdf()' }, ...{
  docs: {
    source: {
      code: downloadPdfCode
    }
  }
} };

export const downloadPdfWizard = (() => DownloadPdfWizard());
downloadPdfWizard.storyName = 'downloadPdfWizard';
downloadPdfWizard.parameters = { storySource: { source: '() => DownloadPdfWizard()' }, ...{
  docs: {
    source: {
      code: downloadPdfWizardCode
    }
  }
} };

const componentMeta = { title: 'Examples/DownloadPdf', includeStories: ["downloadPdf","downloadPdfWizard"],  };

const mdxStoryNameToKey = {"downloadPdf":"downloadPdf","downloadPdfWizard":"downloadPdfWizard"};

componentMeta.parameters = componentMeta.parameters || {};
componentMeta.parameters.docs = {
  ...(componentMeta.parameters.docs || {}),
  page: () => <AddContext mdxStoryNameToKey={mdxStoryNameToKey} mdxComponentAnnotations={componentMeta}><MDXContent /></AddContext>,
};

export default componentMeta;
